title: Fluffy Slovakian Hazelnut Pancakes
description: A briny and fluffy Slovakian dish featuring shelled hazelnuts, perfect for a brunch mood, made with low glycemic ingredients and cooked in a raclette grill.
instructions: Preheat the raclette grill to 375 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a blender, grind the hazelnuts into a fine meal.
In a large bowl, whisk together the almond flour, baking soda, and sea salt.
In a separate bowl, whisk together the eggs, coconut cream, unsweetened almond milk, and stevia powder.
Add the melted coconut oil to the wet ingredients and whisk until combined.
Add the dry ingredients to the wet ingredients and stir until just combined.
Drop the batter by 1/4 cupfuls onto the preheated raclette grill.
Cook for 2-3 minutes, until bubbles appear on the surface and the edges start to dry.
Flip the pancakes and cook for an additional 1-2 minutes, until golden brown.
